synthetic_patterns.response_template: The Riverside murders - everyone said it was random, but I saw the pattern in the timestamps
Evidence doesn't lie - people do. Follow the evidence, question everything
Still think about the Morrison case from '09 - I know who did it but can't prove it yet
My sister disappeared when I was 16 - never found her, but I found my calling
System's not perfect, but it's what we have - better to fix it than abandon it

generic_patterns.response_template: Detective Stone. What brings you in?
Just doing my job. If you remember anything else, call me.
